title: India roots for benefits system at pandemic agreement talks
content:
India is advocating for the establishment of a "benefits system" within the new international pandemic agreement.
*   This proposal is being put forward during ongoing global negotiations on how to respond to future health crises.
*   The system aims to ensure certain advantages or support for countries during potential pandemics.

title: CM Mamata announces development boards for marginalised communities ahead of Bengal Assembly polls
content:
CM Mamata has announced the creation of new development boards.
*   These boards are specifically aimed at benefiting marginalised communities.
*   The announcement comes strategically ahead of the upcoming Bengal Assembly polls.

title: New District Munsif and Judicial Magistrate Court near Katpadi inaugurated
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A new court has been inaugurated.
*   It functions as both a District Munsif and Judicial Magistrate Court.
*   The court is located near Katpadi.

title: Udhayanidhi Stalin to inaugurate lounge for construction workers, village knowledge centre in Tirupattur
content:
Udhayanidhi Stalin is scheduled to inaugurate two new facilities.
*   These include a dedicated lounge specifically for construction workers.
*   He will also open a new village knowledge centre, both located in Tirupattur.

title: Exercise LAMITIYE-2026: India and Seychelles carry out joint military exercise
content:
India and Seychelles are participating in a military exercise.
*   The exercise is named 'LAMITIYE-2026'.
*   It signifies a joint military collaboration between the two nations.

title: Opposition leaders press government, Lok Sabha Speaker to revoke the suspension of 8 MPs
content:
Opposition leaders are demanding action from authorities.
*   Their appeal is specifically directed at the government and the Lok Sabha Speaker.
*   The core objective is to revoke the suspension of 8 Members of Parliament (MPs).

title: Tamil Nadu’s AVGC-XR policy aims for creative boom
content:
Tamil Nadu has introduced a new policy specifically for the AVGC-XR sector.
*   AVGC-XR stands for Animation, Visual Effects, Gaming, Comics, and Extended Reality.
*   The policy aims to significantly boost these creative industries, fostering a "creative boom" in the state.

title: Assistant professor aspirants criticise T.N. government for selective distribution of appointment letters
content:
Assistant professor aspirants are criticizing the Tamil Nadu (T.N.) government.
*   The criticism is over the government's selective distribution of appointment letters.
*   Aspirants allege unfairness in the process of issuing these job offers.

title: AAP govt. will provide facilities for industries to compete with China: Kejriwal
content:
Kejriwal's AAP government plans to provide special facilities for industries.
*   The initiative aims to enhance the capabilities and competitiveness of these industries.
*   The ultimate goal is to enable local industries to effectively compete with China.

title: West Bengal govt. employees protest over DA arrears
content:
West Bengal government employees are currently staging protests.
*   Their protests are focused on the issue of Dearness Allowance (DA).
*   Employees are demanding the clearance of outstanding DA arrears owed to them.
